We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telemarketer

Requirement


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: elimtopview@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, contact: 09070070008.",

Telemarketer Job at Elimtop View Estate Limited




        
    

        
        Elimtop View Estate Limited is a premier real estate firm dedicated to delivering secure, verified, and high-value property development and land investment solutions in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telemarketer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Requirement
     

            
    




	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, contact: 09070070008.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "External Marketer",
  "description": "Zinnia Agency is a recruitment and HR agency offering recruitment services, training and general staffing optiojns to businesses and companies.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: External Marketer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Are you a results-driven sales professional with a passion for fashion and building client relationships? We are seeking a dynamic Business Development Executiveto drive sales, expand our customer base, and increase brand visibility.
	If you are passionate about sales, enjoy meeting people, and have the drive to grow a fashion brand, we would love to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities for the brand.
	Generate leads and convert prospects into loyal clients.
	Promote our ready-to-wear and bespoke fashion collections to individuals and corporate organizations.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective clients.
	Conduct field visits, networking activities, and marketing campaigns to increase brand awareness.
	Achieve monthly sales and revenue targets.
	Prepare sales reports and provide market feedback to management.
	Represent the brand professionally at events, exhibitions, and client meetings.
	Collaborate with the marketing and creative teams to execute promotional initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in business development, sales, or marketing.
	Experience in the fashion, luxury retail, or lifestyle industry is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong networking and relationship-building abilities.
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to&nbsp;&nbsp;work independently.
	Professional appearance and a passion for fashion.


What We Offer


	N200,000 - N250,000 / Month
	Attractive performance-based commission.
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	A dynamic and creative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: zinnia.agency@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mai",

External Marketer Job at Zinnia Agency




        
    

        
        Zinnia Agency is a recruitment and HR agency offering recruitment services, training and general staffing optiojns to businesses and companies.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: External Marketer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	Are you a results-driven sales professional with a passion for fashion and building client relationships? We are seeking a dynamic Business Development Executiveto drive sales, expand our customer base, and increase brand visibility.
	If you are passionate about sales, enjoy meeting people, and have the drive to grow a fashion brand, we would love to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities for the brand.
	Generate leads and convert prospects into loyal clients.
	Promote our ready-to-wear and bespoke fashion collections to individuals and corporate organizations.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective clients.
	Conduct field visits, networking activities, and marketing campaigns to increase brand awareness.
	Achieve monthly sales and revenue targets.
	Prepare sales reports and provide market feedback to management.
	Represent the brand professionally at events, exhibitions, and client meetings.
	Collaborate with the marketing and creative teams to execute promotional initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in business development, sales, or marketing.
	Experience in the fashion, luxury retail, or lifestyle industry is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong networking and relationship-building abilities.
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to  work independently.
	Professional appearance and a passion for fashion.


What We Offer


	N200,000 - N250,000 / Month
	Attractive performance-based commission.
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	A dynamic and creative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mai

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Support Engineer",
  "description": "Skache Integrated Services Limited, a Human Resources company, is&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: IT Support Engineer
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

Job Description


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven IT Support Engineer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for hands-on technical activities, good Networking and server management knowledge, outstanding problem-solving and communication skills, and maintaining relationships with clients.


Responsibilities


	Interacting with customers is a significant part of this IT Rep role.
	Talk clients through a series of actions, either via phone, email, or chat, untilthey&rsquo;ve solved a technical issue
	Install and configure computer systems
	Carry out Network installation from Layer 1 to at least Layer 3
	Monitor logged tickets and identify potential issues proactively
	Maintain relationships with new and existing clients.
	Conduct product or service presentations to potential clients, highlighting features and benefits.
	Prepare regular technical reports for the team, Supervisor review, and meetings.
	Research and identify solutions to software and hardware issues
	Diagnose and troubleshoot technical issues, including account setup and network configuration.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.
	Knowledge and hands-on configuration of Active Directory
	Hands-on experience with Kyocera and HP printing machines, both hardware and software
	Good understanding of computer systems
	Good knowledge/hands-on experience with CCTV Surveillance systems
	Good knowledge/ familiarity with Cisco, Sophos, and Microsoft 365.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: jobs@skacheintegrated.com using the&nbsp;&nbsp;Job Position as subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-24",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",

IT Support Engineer Job at Skache Integrated Services Limited




        
    

        
        Skache Integrated Services Limited, a Human Resources company, is  recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

 Job Position: IT Support Engineer
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 

Job Description


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven IT Support Engineer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for hands-on technical activities, good Networking and server management knowledge, outstanding problem-solving and communication skills, and maintaining relationships with clients.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Interacting with customers is a significant part of this IT Rep role.
	Talk clients through a series of actions, either via phone, email, or chat, untilthey’ve solved a technical issue
	Install and configure computer systems
	Carry out Network installation from Layer 1 to at least Layer 3
	Monitor logged tickets and identify potential issues proactively
	Maintain relationships with new and existing clients.
	Conduct product or service presentations to potential clients, highlighting features and benefits.
	Prepare regular technical reports for the team, Supervisor review, and meetings.
	Research and identify solutions to software and hardware issues
	Diagnose and troubleshoot technical issues, including account setup and network configuration.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.
	Knowledge and hands-on configuration of Active Directory
	Hands-on experience with Kyocera and HP printing machines, both hardware and software
	Good understanding of computer systems
	Good knowledge/hands-on experience with CCTV Surveillance systems
	Good knowledge/ familiarity with Cisco, Sophos, and Microsoft 365.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: [email protected] using the  Job Position as subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "TranSave is an all-purpose FinTech mobile app and web platform that seamlessly handles all your essential financial services including quick and secure Transactions, POS operations, Loan services, Savings, Bill Payments, Card Services, e.t.c

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer&nbsp;

Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT)

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for planning, implementing, and optimizing Transave&#39;s digital marketing campaigns across multiple online channels.
	The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of digital marketing trends, content creation, social media management, SEO, paid advertising, and analytics.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, customer acquisition, and engagement.
	Manage the company&#39;s social media platforms by creating, scheduling, and publishing engaging content.
	Plan and execute paid digital advertising campaigns across platforms such as Google Ads, Meta (Facebook &amp; Instagram), LinkedIn, and other relevant channels.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize marketing efforts based on data and analytics.
	Create compelling marketing content, including graphics, videos, blog articles, email campaigns, and promotional materials.
	Optimize website content using SEO best practices to improve search engine rankings and organic traffic.
	Manage email marketing campaigns, newsletters, and customer engagement initiatives.
	Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitor activities, and new digital marketing opportunities.
	Collaborate with internal teams to support product launches, promotional campaigns, and company events.
	Track key performance indicators (KPIs) and prepare regular marketing performance reports.
	Stay up to date with emerging digital marketing trends, tools, and best practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in digital marketing.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing, SEO, SEM, email marketing, and content marketing.
	Experience managing paid advertising campaigns (Google Ads and Meta Ads).
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Meta Business Suite, Canva, and email marketing platforms.
	Basic knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience marketing fintech, financial services, or technology products.
	Knowledge of CRM platforms and marketing automation tools.
	Familiarity with WordPress or other content management systems.
	Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) and customer journey mapping.

Digital Marketer Job at TranSave Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        TranSave is an all-purpose FinTech mobile app and web platform that seamlessly handles all your essential financial services including quick and secure Transactions, POS operations, Loan services, Savings, Bill Payments, Card Services, e.t.c

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer 

Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT)

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for planning, implementing, and optimizing Transave's digital marketing campaigns across multiple online channels.
	The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of digital marketing trends, content creation, social media management, SEO, paid advertising, and analytics.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, customer acquisition, and engagement.
	Manage the company's social media platforms by creating, scheduling, and publishing engaging content.
	Plan and execute paid digital advertising campaigns across platforms such as Google Ads, Meta (Facebook & Instagram), LinkedIn, and other relevant channels.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize marketing efforts based on data and analytics.
	Create compelling marketing content, including graphics, videos, blog articles, email campaigns, and promotional materials.
	Optimize website content using SEO best practices to improve search engine rankings and organic traffic.
	Manage email marketing campaigns, newsletters, and customer engagement initiatives.
	Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitor activities, and new digital marketing opportunities.
	Collaborate with internal teams to support product launches, promotional campaigns, and company events.
	Track key performance indicators (KPIs) and prepare regular marketing performance reports.
	Stay up to date with emerging digital marketing trends, tools, and best practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in digital marketing.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing, SEO, SEM, email marketing, and content marketing.
	Experience managing paid advertising campaigns (Google Ads and Meta Ads).
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Meta Business Suite, Canva, and email marketing platforms.
	Basic knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to  work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience marketing fintech, financial services, or technology products.
	Knowledge of CRM platforms and marketing automation tools.
	Familiarity with WordPress or other content management systems.
	Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) and customer journey mapping.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Technical Engineer",
  "description": "Balosh Integrated Services Limited is a leading provider of access control services. Balosh is Nigeria&#39;s premier Car Parks, Highway Management, Access Control, Automatic Entrances Firm that manages parking facilities, finances the design and development of parking facilities and provides consultation to landlords with respect to all parking related matters.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Technical Engineer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a Technical Support Engineer with proven experience in Access Control (ELV) Systems to install, maintain, troubleshoot, and support electronic security solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Install, configure, test, and maintain access control systems, including biometric devices, smart locks, card readers, turnstiles, and CCTV integrations.
	Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network-related issues.
	Perform preventive maintenance, system upgrades, and commissioning.
	Provide technical support and user training to clients.
	Maintain accurate service documentation and technical reports.
	Collaborate with project teams to ensure seamless system deployment and client handover.
	Recommend system improvements and stay up to date with emerging security technologies.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or HND in Electrical Engineering, Computer&nbsp;&nbsp;Science, IT, or a related field.
	Hands-on experience with Access Control (ELV) systems is compulsory.
	Strong understanding of computer networking, including TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, IP addressing, switches, routers, and network troubleshooting.
	Excellent troubleshooting, communication, and customer service skills.
	Ability to work independently and travel for client support when required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@balosh.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: If you&#39;re passionate about delivering reliable security technology solutions and meet the requirements above, we&#39;d love to hear from you.",

Technical Engineer Job at Balosh Integrated Services Limited




        
    

        
        Balosh Integrated Services Limited is a leading provider of access control services. Balosh is Nigeria's premier Car Parks, Highway Management, Access Control, Automatic Entrances Firm that manages parking facilities, finances the design and development of parking facilities and provides consultation to landlords with respect to all parking related matters. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Technical Engineer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a Technical Support Engineer with proven experience in Access Control (ELV) Systems to install, maintain, troubleshoot, and support electronic security solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Install, configure, test, and maintain access control systems, including biometric devices, smart locks, card readers, turnstiles, and CCTV integrations.
	Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network-related issues.
	Perform preventive maintenance, system upgrades, and commissioning.
	Provide technical support and user training to clients.
	Maintain accurate service documentation and technical reports.
	Collaborate with project teams to ensure seamless system deployment and client handover.
	Recommend system improvements and stay up to date with emerging security technologies.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree or HND in Electrical Engineering, Computer  Science, IT, or a related field.
	Hands-on experience with Access Control (ELV) systems is compulsory.
	Strong understanding of computer networking, including TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, IP addressing, switches, routers, and network troubleshooting.
	Excellent troubleshooting, communication, and customer service skills.
	Ability to work independently and travel for client support when required.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: If you're passionate about delivering reliable security technology solutions and meet the requirements above, we'd love to hear from you.    

    

        Click here to Apply
